title: Superintendent / JrHi-HS Principal & AD
notes: Class C combined supt-principal-AD; confirmed via Stillwater County Schools Directory. Address: 327 S Woodard Ave, Absarokee, MT 59001.

title: Superintendent
notes: Arlee Joint School District. Beckham resigning effective June 30, 2026 to become assistant superintendent at MCPS - district will hire successor. Tribal/Confederated Salish-Kootenai partnership district; serves PreK-12. Address: 220 Fyant Street, Arlee, MT 59821.

title: Superintendent / Powell County Superintendent of Schools
notes: Tiny Class C K-8 (~4 FT teachers, 0 admins per NCES). Glisson is the Powell County Superintendent who oversees Avon. Direct school phone: (406) 492-6191. No district website; routed through Powell County. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: Combined supt/principal. Conrow retiring June 30, 2025 - Dr. Josh Patterson (formerly Brockton) selected as successor effective July 1, 2025. Address: 104 N Pacific St, Dillon, MT 59725.

title: Dawson County Superintendent of Schools
notes: School has no current students - parents pulled remaining 6 students in Jan 2026 over teacher concerns; effectively closed/inactive. No district staff. County Supt is fallback contact. Avoid outreach until enrollment restored.

title: Superintendent
notes: Class C K-12 tribal district on Fort Peck Assiniboine-Sioux Reservation (97% Native American). Engebretson replaced Dr. Josh Patterson who left for Beaverhead County HS in 2025. Address: 540 5th Street, Brockton, MT 59213. Strong Head Start partnership likely - reservation school.

title: Supervising Teacher / Lead Teacher
notes: One-teacher Class C K-8 (~8 students). Armstrong is in her 13th year as sole teacher. District scheduled to close end of 2025-26 school year due to projected 2 students for 2026-27. School email is general gmail; Brook Durocher (Teton County Supt, bdurocher@tetoncountymt.gov, 406-466-2907) is county fallback.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: Class III rural K-8 in Kalispell. Piazzola retiring end of 2025-26; Christy Bortz (currently instructional coach at Hedges Elementary, Kalispell) selected as successor starting July 1, 2026. Note domain is cayuse.k12.mt.us not cayuseprairie. Address: 897 Lake Blaine Rd, Kalispell, MT 59901.

title: Superintendent / 7-12 Principal
notes: Haggerty took over from Tim Bronk in 2023. Combined K-12 district. Extension 6302. Address: 511 Main St, Chester, MT 59522.

title: Garfield County Superintendent of Schools
notes: Tiny K-8 (~13 students, 1 FT teacher, 0 admins per NCES). No district website or district staff. Gibson is County Supt fallback - she previously coordinated COVID response and oversees Cohagen. Likely candidates for district contact are the single classroom teacher (name not found publicly).

title: Principal (resigning) / District Principal with Superintendent Duties
notes: PK-6 district near Kalispell. Stevens resigned end of 2024-25. Board interviewed finalists (Fernanda Adame among them) in March 2025 - successor likely in place for 2025-26 but name not yet publicly confirmed at time of research. Position is in transition.

title: County Superintendent (district has 0 admins)
notes: Per NCES 2022-23 data: 0.00 district administrators, 0.00 school administrators. No district website. District is supervised by Fergus County Superintendent of Schools - county-supt fallback only. Tiny one-school colony-style district. Email needed - check Apollo.io for current county supt name.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: K-12 paired Elem+HS sharing supt. Phillips took over recently. Email domain likely drummondschool.net but not publicly confirmed - check Apollo.io. Address: 108 W Edwards, PO Box 349, Drummond, MT 59832.

title: Superintendent
notes: Larger K-8 district in Billings area (~700+ students). Email pattern goltzj@ inferred per ZoomInfo masked listing 'g***@eldergrove.k12.mt.us' - moderate confidence on exact local-part. Address: 1532 South 64 Street W, Billings MT 59106. Extension 4 for supt direct.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny K-8 (~13-15 students). Krystle Hatton-Grover is Head Teacher. Email pattern not publicly confirmed for fishtailschool.org domain. Address: 119 Easton Ave, Fishtail, MT 59028. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: K-8 district near Bozeman. Henderson (Ed.D.) joined in 2022 from Arizona (Fountain Hills USD). Note Travis Anderson Ed.D. also surfaced in some sources - possible recent transition. ZoomInfo confirms email domain @gallatingatewayschool.com but exact local-part not displayed. Address: 100 Mill Street, Gallatin Gateway, MT 59730.

title: County Superintendent (no district admin)
notes: Hutterite colony school in Hill County (15 students, 2 FT teachers, 0.5 district admin, 0 school admin per NCES 2023-24). No named individual surfaces publicly - colony schools intentionally keep low profile. School website exists but no staff directory visible. Per Montana convention, supervised by Hill County Supt. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Supervising Teacher
notes: Two-room K-8 in Granite County between Drummond and Philipsburg. Granite County Supt of Schools is combined position with County Treasurer (elected). Kielley is the supervising teacher; she is the practical decision-maker. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent
notes: K-12 district near Great Falls. Suberg has been growing the district. Note Brianna Bowman also appears on staff page in some search results - possibly assistant or successor (lower confidence).

title: Supervising Teacher
notes: Hutterite colony school in Fergus County (~7 students, 1 FT teacher, 0.25 district admin, 0 school admin per NCES 2023-24). Patterson is sole supervising teacher (per 2021 MT school directory). Ann Econom is District Clerk (406-462-5421). No publicly visible email. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent
notes: Note non-standard domain (.com, not .k12.mt.us). K-12 Class C district in Golden Valley County. Address: 214 1st Street East, PO Box 290, Lavina, MT 59046.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Largest district in this batch (~1250 K-8 + new HS, 1500+ total). Meiers is dedicated Curriculum Director - matches ECE priority #2 perfectly. Supt is Don Christman (email pattern c***@lockwoodschool.org per ZoomInfo - likely christmand@). Lockwood has PK and full-day K. Email needed - check Apollo.io for Meiers. Address: 1932 US Highway 87 E, Billings, MT 59101. STRONG OUTREACH TARGET.

title: Gallatin County Superintendent of Schools (oversees Malmborg directly)
notes: Historic one-room K-8 schoolhouse near Bozeman (7 students). Per Gallatin County, Malmborg is one of 4 one-room schools without district supts - directly supervised by County Supt John Nielson. No district email. County supt is best fallback. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent
notes: K-8 in Bozeman growth area. Eric Fisher is Principal. Non-standard domain (.org). Address: 6001 Monforton School Road, Bozeman, MT 59718. Growing district likely with PreK needs.

title: Superintendent
notes: Hi-Line K-12 district in Rudyard. Domain is nsschools.org. Email pattern not publicly visible; likely khalverson@nsschools.org but unconfirmed. Note recent news indicated Halverson considering stepping down. Address: 105 3rd Ave NE, Box 129, Rudyard MT 59540. Phone may be (406) 376-3183. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: PK-5 district in Livingston (Park County), ~25 students. Non-standard domain (pcs19.org). Rhonda Lahaye is Business Manager (clerk@pcs19.org). Address: 2575 East River Rd, Livingston, MT 59047.

title: Superintendent
notes: K-12 Class C in Teton County. Pieper took over as supt and is available 8am-7pm direct. Address: 402 Teton Avenue, Power, MT 59468.

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: PK-8 in Missoula County. Hartmann started August 2024 as combined Supt/Principal. Domain sleonline.org. District passed levy 2024 - financially stable.

Hutterite colony school in Fergus County. Per PublicSchoolReview, school closed in 2024. NCES last reported 2 students, 1 FT teacher, 0.25 district admin. No current public contact - district may be inactive. If still operating, Fergus County Supt would be fallback. Recommend skipping outreach.
